summary: Complete e2e testing of MindHire AI platform completed successfully. All core features working: authentication, dashboard, interview system, AI evaluation (with fallback), and PDF reports.

ai_integration_notes.details: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY integration had initial issues, fallback to predefined questions working correctly
ai_integration_notes.impact: Users can complete interviews using high-quality fallback questions

design_feedback.feedback: Excellent implementation of lilac/pink psychology theme as requested
design_feedback.details: Beautiful gradients, consistent branding, modern UI components

design_feedback.feedback: Smooth user journey from registration to results
design_feedback.details: Clear navigation, proper feedback messages, intuitive interview flow
Clean spacing, proper typography, good contrast ratios
